2:Tb05,{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"What's the current APY for ETH Dolomite?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"ETH Dolomite is showing a 24-hour APY of 0.91%, with a 30-day average of 1.86%. Rates are variable and move with market conditions, liquidity, and the underlying protocol's incentives. The figures reflect the realised yield over the trailing window; they are not a forward guarantee."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How does the autocompounding work?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"The strategy holds positions in its underlying lending venue and the yield that accrues is added back to the vault on a recurring basis, increasing the value of each holder's share. The process repeats automatically; holders are not required to claim or add anything back themselves. Autocompounding events run when economically feasible, anywhere from hourly to several days apart, with gas costs socialised across all holders."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Can I withdraw at any time?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"There are no withdrawal periods or lockups. If the underlying strategy holds enough liquidity to satisfy the request, exits are instant. During periods of liquidity stress in the underlying venue, withdrawal capacity can be limited until liquidity returns. See the risk page for details on how this works."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Where does the yield come from?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yield is sourced from its underlying lending venue. The income stream is interest paid by the underlying market, added back to the vault on a recurring basis. The rate moves with the underlying venue's utilisation."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How stable has the APY been?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Over the last 30 days, this vault's APY has ranged from 0.91% to 3.37%, averaging 1.91%, with measured volatility of ±0.74%. The Strategy stability section above shows where this falls on the scale from very volatile to very consistent."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How much is currently in the vault?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"The vault currently holds $141 in TVL across 4 holders. The Historical statistics section above shows how this compares to the vault's 30-day range and lifetime peak."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What are the risks?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Like any onchain yield strategy, this vault is exposed to smart contract risk in both the Harvest contracts and its underlying lending venue, market risk in the underlying venue it routes to, and protocol-specific risks of the assets it interacts with. Harvest's core vault infrastructure was audited by Halborn in January 2025. Audits reduce but do not eliminate risk."}}]}0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[[["$","script",null,{"type":"application/ld+json","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"{\"@context\":\"https://schema.org\",\"@type\":\"FinancialProduct\",\"name\":\"ETH Dolomite\",\"url\":\"https://harvest.finance/eth-dolomite-arbitrum\",\"description\":\"ETH Dolomite on Dolomite (Arbitrum). d:["$","div",null,{"className":"uni-below","children":[["$","section",null,{"className":"pp-section","id":"about","children":[["$","h2",null,{"children":["About ","ETH Dolomite"]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"about-prose","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"ETH Dolomite"}]," is an ","autocompounder on Arbitrum with ETH as its underlying token, in which the yield is distributed. It earns yield from its underlying lending venue and automatically converts any claimed rewards into more ETH, removing the manual claim and conversion steps a user would otherwise need to perform on their own."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Yield earned by the strategy is added back to the vault on a recurring basis. Autocompounding events run when economically feasible, anywhere from hourly to several days apart, with gas costs socialised across all holders rather than borne by each user individually."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Live since October 2024. Currently indexed at $141 TVL across 4 holders, with a 0.91% 24-hour APY and 1.86% across the trailing 30 days."}]]}]]}],["$","section",null,{"className":"pp-section","id":"performance-overview","children":[["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance Overview"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"pp-numbered-list","children":[["$","div","0",{"className":"pp-numbered-item","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"pp-num-badge","children":"01"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"pp-num-text","children":"This vault's 0.91% APY ranks #21 among the 30 ETH vaults we monitor, with 20 strategies currently delivering higher APY."}]]}],["$","div","1",{"className":"pp-numbered-item","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"pp-num-badge","children":"02"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"pp-num-text","children":"Over the past 30 days, APY has ranged from 0.91% to 3.37%, averaging 1.91%. 28:["$","div",null,{"className":"pp-section","id":"faq","children":[["$","h2",null,{"children":"Frequently Asked Questions"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"faq","children":[["$","details","0",{"open":true,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"What's the current APY for ETH Dolomite?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"ETH Dolomite is showing a 24-hour APY of 0.91%, with a 30-day average of 1.86%. Rates are variable and move with market conditions, liquidity, and the underlying protocol's incentives. The figures reflect the realised yield over the trailing window; they are not a forward guarantee."}]]}],["$","details","1",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"How does the autocompounding work?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"The strategy holds positions in its underlying lending venue and the yield that accrues is added back to the vault on a recurring basis, increasing the value of each holder's share. The process repeats automatically; holders are not required to claim or add anything back themselves. Autocompounding events run when economically feasible, anywhere from hourly to several days apart, with gas costs socialised across all holders."}]]}],["$","details","2",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Can I withdraw at any time?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["There are no withdrawal periods or lockups. If the underlying strategy holds enough liquidity to satisfy the request, exits are instant. During periods of liquidity stress in the underlying venue, withdrawal capacity can be limited until liquidity returns. See"," ",["$","$L8",null,{"href":"/risk-framework","children":"the risk page"}]," for details on how this works."]}]]}],["$","details","3",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Where does the yield come from?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Yield is sourced from its underlying lending venue. The income stream is interest paid by the underlying market, added back to the vault on a recurring basis. The rate moves with the underlying venue's utilisation."}]]}],["$","details","4",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"How stable has the APY been?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Over the last 30 days, this vault's APY has ranged from 0.91% to 3.37%, averaging 1.91%, with measured volatility of ±0.74%. The Strategy stability section above shows where this falls on the scale from very volatile to very consistent."}]]}],["$","details","5",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"How much is currently in the vault?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"The vault currently holds $141 in TVL across 4 holders. The Historical statistics section above shows how this compares to the vault's 30-day range and lifetime peak."}]]}],["$","details","6",{"open":false,"children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"What are the risks?"}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Like any onchain yield strategy, this vault is exposed to smart contract risk in both the Harvest contracts and its underlying lending venue, market risk in the underlying venue it routes to, and protocol-specific risks of the assets it interacts with. Harvest's core vault infrastructure was audited by Halborn in January 2025. Audits reduce but do not eliminate risk."}]]}]]}]]}]
